node.html: Crossfill is an AI-powered SaaS analytics platform that delivers real-time performance insights through interactive dashboards and advanced data visualization. The platform leverages GenAI-driven automation to enrich data, generate actionable recommendations, and streamline reporting workflows. Built on scalable cloud infrastructure with workflow orchestration and distributed processing, ensures reliable, high-performance operations for data-intensive commerce environments.

Therify is a mental health and wellness platform focused on providing culturally responsive care to individuals and organizations. It connects employees to a network of diverse therapists and coaches, aiming to improve mental health accessibility, inclusivity, and outcomes. Therify empowers businesses to support employee well-being through personalized care solutions, education, and data-driven insights.

Axle Health is an in-home healthcare logistics platform focused on intelligent scheduling, routing, and operations workflows. The product helps care teams coordinate visits, optimize clinician time, and improve reliability across distributed field operations. Built with a product-first mindset, it blends operational depth with a clean experience for clinical and admin teams. I contributed to improving workflow clarity, delivery reliability, and full-stack execution across planning and day-of-operations experiences. The result was a more dependable platform for care coordination teams managing high-volume, time-sensitive logistics.
